contract_claim: The guard `!port` rejects port 0 (falsy) and NaN, but also silently allows negative port numbers (e.g., parseInt('-1', 10) = -1, which is truthy). A negative port will be passed to createBridge and likely cause a runtime error there.
observed_behavior: The guard `!port` rejects port 0 (falsy) and NaN, but also silently allows negative port numbers (e.g., parseInt('-1', 10) = -1, which is truthy). A negative port will be passed to createBridge and likely cause a runtime error there.
